package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_map: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services configured by `map[string]any` or similar untyped blobs.
type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMap(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapDTO) error {
    focus := "service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    cfg := map[string]string{"service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_map": "configured at startup"}
    _ = cfg
    service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative := map[string]int{"service": 1, "constructor": 2, "accepts": 3, "untyped": 4, "config": 5, "map": 6}
    service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_negative_0 := CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_0
    constructor_negative_1 := service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["constructor"] + len(input)
    _ = constructor_negative_1
    accepts_negative_2 := service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["accepts"] + len(input)
    _ = accepts_negative_2
    untyped_negative_3 := service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["untyped"] + len(input)
    _ = untyped_negative_3
    config_negative_4 := service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["config"] + len(input)
    _ = config_negative_4
    map_negative_5 := service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_5
    return nil
}
